cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out what ball Alice ends up with after all these swaps. So there are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a specific color. Let me jot down the initial assignments first: - Alice: Black - Bob: Brown - Claire: Blue - Dave: White - Eve: Green Now, there are five swaps in total. Let me go through each one step by step. First swap: Dave and Eve swap balls. So initially, Dave has white, Eve has green. After swapping, Dave now has green, and Eve has white. Let me update the list: - Alice: Black - Bob: Brown - Claire: Blue - Dave: Green - Eve: White Second swap: Bob and Claire swap. Bob had brown, Claire had blue. After swapping: - Bob: Blue - Claire: Brown Third swap: Claire and Alice swap. Claire now has brown, Alice has black. After swapping: - Claire: Black - Alice: Brown Fourth swap: Dave and Eve swap again. After the first swap, Dave had green, Eve had white. Swapping again would return them to their original positions?
